title: Kenyan Sweet Potato Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with perfectly cooked sweet potatoes, smoked meat, and Kenyan spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced smoked meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the curry powder, cumin, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chopped sweet potatoes and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
